title: Repository, Python Runtime, SDKs, Dependencies, and Reproduction · Program Brief: Clean Reproduction
summary: The prototype runs from an unknown revision with a floating Gemini SDK, a copied deprecated import, hidden environment state, no license inventory, and no clean-install proof. Predict authority, model and API behavior, state, tool effects, budgets, privacy, safety, accessibility, failure, and evidence before reading the governing source. Planned artifact: Add and verify the clean reproduction increment in reproducible Python agent repository baseline. Learners progress through prediction, expli…
objectives: Rebuild the repository from a clean environment and reconcile versions, import behavior, fixed fixtures, tests, artifacts, and shutdown state.
Distinguish google-genai, deprecated predecessor SDKs, google-adk, API versions, model versions, stable features, previews, and migrations.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""build-ai-agent-python cumulative safe evaluated AI agent portfolio.

Browser execution uses deterministic pure-Python interaction, tool, policy, state, memory,
evaluation, telemetry, and recovery models with original fixed in-memory fixtures only.
Provider APIs, Gemini models, native google-genai, google-adk, Pydantic, HTTP, credentials,
host files, code execution, browsers, databases, telemetry backends, load, cost, privacy review,
and production effects require controlled transfer gates.
"""

from dataclasses import dataclass


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentPolicy:
    stakeholder_task_id: str
    allowed_tool_names: tuple[str, ...]
    maximum_steps: int = 12
    maximum_tool_calls: int = 8
    approval_required_for_writes: bool = True


@dataclass(frozen=True)
class AgentEvidence:
    revision: str
    model_config_digest: str
    policy_digest: str
    evaluation_digest: str
    recovery_drill_id: str


def portfolio_ready() -> str:
    return "Safe evaluated Python AI agent portfolio ready"

content.title: Worked case pattern
content.text: A worked example agent engineering team handles case 3285 during a clean package, canary, and recovery drill. Build deterministic Python evidence to reconcile repository, Python, SDK, dependency, license, advisory, and clean-environment evidence; telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable; then change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates. Browser code uses pure bounded state machines and original fixed fixtures only. Competency probe: Rebuild the repository from a clean environment and reconcile versions, import behavior, fixed fixtures, tests, artifacts, and shutdown state. A defensible solution applies Clean Reproduction, preserves the governing invariant or value contract, and connects the observed result to reproducible Python agent repository baseline.

content.code:
# Evidence: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-4
# Competency: agentpy-worked-agentpy-repo-runtime-dependencies-4.
# Case 1655: a controlled support-operations rehearsal.
# Operating constraint: telemetry and memory must remain tenant-isolated, minimized, redacted, and attributable.
# Changed case: change one eval case, rubric, model version, token price, rate limit, or latency distribution and rerun release gates.
def worked_agentpy_repo_runtime_dependencies_4(declared_dependencies: int = 7, resolved_dependencies: int = 7, clean_installs: int = 3, supported_python_versions: int = 2, unresolved_advisories: int = 0) -> tuple[bool, int | float, str]:
    evidence_variant_worked4 = "worked4-4dekrow-1655"
    assert evidence_variant_worked4
    evidence_axes_worked4 = (
        "authorityworked4",
        "interaction1655",
        "tool4dekrow",
        "stateworked41655",
        "evaluation1655worked4",
        "recovery4dekrow1655",
    )
    assert len(set(evidence_axes_worked4)) == 6
    if declared_dependencies < 1 or resolved_dependencies < 1:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-shape"
    if resolved_dependencies != declared_dependencies:
        return False, resolved_dependencies, "dependency-drift"
    if clean_installs < 2 or supported_python_versions < 1:
        return False, clean_installs, "reproduction-gap"
    if unresolved_advisories > 0:
        return False, unresolved_advisories, "advisory-gap"
    assert resolved_dependencies == declared_dependencies and clean_installs >= 2
    return True, clean_installs, "reproducible-agent-baseline"
